This chart summarizes **Ronald C Kessler** 's peer-reviewed articles by year and the citations to those articles. Here, the citation curve represents citations to peer-reviewed articles published in year X, not the total citations received in year X.

Download data: [JSON](https://exaly.com/author/9494239/article-citations/graph-data.json) [CSV](https://exaly.com/author/9494239/article-citations/graph-data.csv)

  
## What is the publication profile of _Ronald C Kessler_ ?

In the Exaly corpus, **Ronald C Kessler** has 662 PR articles and 194,336 PR citations. In the broader document cohort, that becomes 739 documents and 228,162 document citations. That is an average of 293.6 PR citations per PR article. The current _h_ \-index is 195. The current PR _h_ \-index is 181. The current _g_ \-index is 429.

**Profile**

This is not a personal profile, but a statistical analysis of the author, similar to those for journals, institutions, and schools.  
  
The affiliation shown is not the author's current affiliation, but the one with the most publications.

**Metric Scope**

Peer-reviewed article counts, peer-reviewed citation counts, and the peer-reviewed _h_ \-index use peer-reviewed articles and citations from peer-reviewed articles only. The _h_ \-index, document counts, and document citations use the broader indexed document set, including non-peer-reviewed items and books.
